name: Rangiku and Yoruichi - Bubble Trouble
description:
Being a newly made soul reaper about merc'ing some hollows and even making your own shikai, you go over to a hot springs that was made the Soul Society... And was made a victim of two beauties and their gassy asses.

"Come on, stop wiggling! That tickles~" .... "Nah, Let em' fight it off... It's Cute~"

(The artist is GassyTank. I am biased.)
